title: Arizona wins Big 12; Lloyd calls out 'soft' narrative

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Navarrete keeps top spot with dominant win over Nunez
content: Emanuel Navarette dominated Eduardo Nunez to keep his top spot at 130 pounds. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Railways to run 56 Holi special trains
content: South Western Railway is operating 856 trips till March 31 across various railway zones to ensure smooth, safe travelling and also, to avoid rush

content: The initiative aims to transform autorickshaw and cab drivers from mere transporters of passengers to cultural ambassadors who explain the history and heritage of the region to tourists

title: Sericulture experience park inaugurated near Coonoor in the Nilgiris
content: The park reflects the “Soil to Silk” concept and showcases the entire process — from mulberry cultivation to silk saree production — in a demonstrative and educational manner.

title: Four arrested after man gives supari for wife’s murder, makes it look like an accident
content: Video footage of the accident captured on the dashcam of a KSRTC bus forced the police to suspect it to be foul play

title: ₹490 crore lift irrigation project proposed to address drinking water crisis in Hanur
content: The project envisages drawing water from the Cauvery near Saragur village in Kollegal taluk and pumping it to the Uduthorehalla reservoir in Hanur taluk. From there, water will be supplied to tanks, lakes and check dams in Kurattihosuru, Santekane and surrounding areas

title: Fruits of welfare schemes should reach all the eligible people: CM
content: Lapses in the implementation of Praja Palana – Pragati Pranalika will not be tolerated, warns Revanth Reddy

content: He says that webcasting facility has been set up at the ZP office to monitor activities in all 43 examination centres in the district

title: Holi 2026: Hyderabad wakes to dhol beat, coloured streets and day-long celebrations

title: Safety and welfare of Telugus stranded in the Gulf a top priority, says A.P. Minister Kondapalli Srinivas

title: Milk adulteration death’s rise to seven, 10 elderly, three infants still battling for life in Rajamahendravaram city
content: The reports of blood and food sample tests being done by multiple agencies are yet conclude substances used in the adulteration of milk consumed by the 110 families in Rajamahendravaram city.

content: Tseilhoutuo Rhütso questioned the enforceability of the Ministry of Home Affairs directive in a predominantly Christian State protected under special constitutional provisions

title: Polavaram project progressing as per established engineering standards, asserts government
content: Rebutting the comments of Center for Liberty on quality and alleged unauthorised design changes, the Water Resources Department says that all design changes have been made following due technical review and expert consultation

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

content: During interrogation, the duo allegedly confessed to stealing phones from passengers travelling in BMTC buses.

title: Deputy Chief Minister Pawan Kalyan calls on Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu, discusses key rural development issues
content: The meeting focuses, among other aspects, on the progress of works under the Jal Jeevan Mission, utilisation of allocated funds, and financial provision for the development of roads under the Panchayat Raj Department

title: AAI seeks info on fuel stocks from international airport operators amid West Asia crisis
content: Operators have also been asked to provide details about average daily fuel consumption, estimated fuel requirement for the next seven days and date of next scheduled fuel replenishment, the sources said

title: DMK offers 27 Assembly seats, awaits Congress response
content: Tamil Nadu CM M.K. Stalin told Congress leader P. Chidambaram that the issue could have been resolved much earlier had the Congress deputed him as mediator

content: Commission headed by retired IAS officer Dinesh Kumar begins probe to examine decision-making process, procedural deviations and chain of responsibility flagged by CBI-led SIT; report due in 45 days

title: Govt. yet to pay DA arrears for employees, pensioners, says AP JAC Amaravati
content: The arrears from July 2018 to January 2024, as well as four additional DA instalments and their arrears from July 2024 to January 2026, are pending payment, they say

title: Bengaluru: Man stabbed to death over trivial row
content: Two men allegedly picked up a quarrel with the victim over an issue of accidentally stepping on the foot of one of the accused.

title: Study finds climate-resilient traits in wild ‘Sikkim banana’
content: Nagaland University researchers highlight the importance of Musa sikkimensis for food security and sustainable agricultural development

title: ‘Kantara’ actor Sapthami Gowda slams paparazzi for vidoes and photos with “inappropriate angles”
content: In a powerful social media post, Kannada actor Sapthami Gowda has taken a stand against paparazzi who snap “disrespectful pictures” of female artists from “inappropriate angles”

title: Dubai authorities stepped in, Indian embassy absent: Karnataka MLC Bhojegowda after return from West Asia conflict zone
content: He was among 213 travellers, including badminton star P.V. Sindhu, who reached India after services gradually resumed.

title: Congress inches closer to finalising candidate list for Assembly polls in Kerala
content: The partry’s Central Election Committee is set to review the initial list of candidates next week. The KPCC has submitted a list featuring several incumbent MLAs and prominent figures. With Congress planning to contest at least 60 constituencies, the party faces critical decisions on candidate selections, particularly in Palakkad.

title: DMK plays hard, now it is for AICC high command to decide: TNCC leadership
content: The DMK has said that the Congress must accept this offer to accommodate few more political parties who have become a part of the alliance for the Assembly elections, a Congress leader said

title: Iran-Israel war: India expresses ‘great anxiety’ over intensification of conflict in West Asia
content: Unfortunate that the situation has deteriorated amidst the “Holy Month of Ramadan”; safety and well-being of almost one crore Indian citizens in the Gulf region is of utmost priority

title: Iran-Israel war: PM Modi speaks with leaders of Oman, Kuwait, expresses concern over attacks
content: During the discussions, PM Modi expressed concern at the attacks in the respective countries and discussed the welfare and security of the Indian community

title: Students urged to download SSC exam hall tickets only from official sources
content: The hall tickets would be released this week through the official website: www.bse.ap.gov.in, WhatsApp governance Mana Mitra Service (No: 9552300009) and LEAP application of the School Education department, the Director Government Examinations said

title: Iranian Consulate in Hyderabad to open condolence book for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on March 5 and 6
content: The condolence book will be open on March 5 and March 6, between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m., according to a press note.

content: Abdullah emphasised that if protests are held, they should be conducted sensitively to ensure the safety of other citizens

title: Centre clears ₹2,924-crore extra borrowing space for Kerala tied to State’s power reforms, says Electricity Minister K. Krishnankutty
content: Minister terms Centre’s decision ‘an acknowledgement of operational efficiency’ displayed by Kerala in power sector

title: Mandatory biometrics update: UIDAI finishes 1.2 crore biometric captures at schools
content: The initiative was taken in partnership with State education departments and “ecosystem partners,” the UIDAI said, adding it used over 4,000 machines to update children’s biometrics in schools

title: Defence Ministry signs contract worth ₹5,083 crore with HAL for acquisition of military helicopters, surface-to-air missiles
content: The acquisition is intended to substantially enhance the air defence capabilities of frontline warships against a wide spectrum of aerial threats, the Defence Ministry said

title: A.P. Tourism launches ‘Driver-Cum-Guide’ training with Rapido in Vijayawada
content: Drivers were trained to use translation tools like ‘Bhashini’ app and Google Translate to communicate effectively with international tourists and also given storytelling training to narrate the historical significance of landmarks in an engaging manner

title: West Asia conflict: Over 250 flights cancelled at four airports
content: For the fourth day, flight operations continued to be disrupted as airlines cancelled flights amid the escalating conflict involving the U.S., Israel and Iran

title: School-based assessment launched in Mysuru to identify hearing disorders
content: AIISH and Mysuru district administration join hands to launch the initiative for assessment in schools for a comprehensive early detection and intervention for speech, language, and hearing disorders among children

title: Rising input costs, cheap imports squeezing farmers’ livelihoods: YSRCP’s Nagi Reddy
content: “When essential farm inputs cost more than double the price farmers receive for their produce, how can farming remain viable?” Nagi Reddy questioned

title: BJP president Nitin Nabin set for Rajya Sabha entry; party rewards performers with tickets
content: Nominations from the poll-bound States of Assam and West Bengal signal that new candidates will be fielded for the Assembly elections with State leaders being moved to Delhi

title: Census 2027 to be first fully-digital exercise; House Listing Operations from May 11: Telangana CS
content: Citizens can voluntarily submit their data online through a designated platform, self enumeration to commence 15 days prior to House Listing Operations

title: ‘Hanuman’ project launched to tackle human–wildlife conflict in Andhra Pradesh
content: The project — Healing and Nurturing Units for Monitoring, Aid and Nursing of Wildlife (HANUMAN)  — has been designed as a comprehensive scientific and technological intervention to protect both wildlife and people living in forest fringe villages

title: Left parties condemn ‘illegal arrest’ of Anganwadi workers during Vijayawada protest
content: In a joint statement issued on March 3, the Left parties said that the Anganwadi workers had been holding a 30-hour peaceful dharna at Dharna Chowk since the previous morning

title: Does PM Modi support head of state's assassination as way to define world order, Rahul Gandhi asks
content: Says silence on attack on Iran diminishes India’s global standing; calls for clarity on foreign policy

content: Shipping companies have also been advised to exercise due caution in crew deployment and to maintain regular communication with seafarers and their families

title: KITE launches QR code-based mobile app for real-time tracking of higher secondary exams in Kerala
content: KITE-QTrack app is designed to provide real-time tracking and monitoring of the entire higher secondary examination process – from opening of question paper packets at exam centres to dispatch of answer scripts to valuation camps

title: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin inaugurates home for senior citizens, Mudhalvar Padaippagams
content: The home is spread over 25,500 sqft and could accommodate 75 elderly citizens. Various amenities, facilities to provide physiotherapy, first aid, among others are available at this home

title: Backchannel diplomacy: How DMK and Congress bridged the divide
content: Before setting out to begin the negotiations, Mr Chidambaram held a virtual meeting with Congress leaders Sonia Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge

title: Review of That’s a Fire Ant Right There, stories by Telugu writer Mohammed Khadeer Babu
content: The anthology, translated by D.V. Subhashri, challenges myths and celebrates communal harmony in coastal Andhra Pradesh

title: Concerns over delay in starting training of newly-selected assistant loco pilots of South Western Railway
content: Working loco pilots claim to be facing a heavy workload with many struggling to get proper rest and leave due to a large number of vacant posts

title: Iran conflict: Shinde arranges flights to bring back 164 stranded in UAE; Government launches helpline
content: The State Government has also launched an emergency WhatsApp helpline +971 50 365 4357, for hundreds of State residents stranded in the Middle East

title: Tirunelveli double murder: Nainar Nagenthran, Vijay slam DMK government
content: Their reaction came after an armed gang, allegedly under the influence of alcohol or drugs, killed two persons at Perumpaththu village in Tirunelveli district

title: DVAC may file review against order to register FIR in cash for jobs scam in K.N. Nehru’s department, A-G tells Madras High Court
content: Makes the submission during the hearing of a contempt of court petition filed by AIADMK MP I.S. Inbadurai against DVAC former director (in-charge) A.T. Durai Kumar

title: 'Missile, drone attack imminent': US embassy in Saudi Arabia issues security alert
content: The US Embassy in Saudi Arabia issued a warning of imminent missile and UAV attacks over Dhahran, advising American citizens to shelter immediately. The alert follows escalating regional tensions after US and Israeli airstrikes on Iranian sites, leading to retaliatory attacks by Iran on Israeli territory and US bases in Gulf states.

title: From 'pattern of life' to precision strike: The hidden build-up by Israel and US to kill Khamenei
content: In a dramatic operation, Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed in coordinated US-Israeli strikes. Years of meticulous surveillance, including hacked traffic cameras and disrupted phone networks, provided crucial intelligence. This enabled a precise strike during a rare meeting, marking a significant escalation driven by political decisions and advanced technological capabilities.

title: US-Iran war: Indian students moved out of Tehran
content: The Indian Embassy in Tehran has moved most Indian students to safer areas outside the city. This action follows heightened risks due to ongoing US-Iran tensions. The embassy is providing transportation, food, and accommodation. Other Indian nationals in Iran are advised to stay indoors and avoid protests. Emergency helplines are active as the security situation is closely monitored.

title: Netflix CEO: WB deal will force Paramount CEO David Ellison to layoff thousands
content: Netflix's Ted Sarandos revealed the company bowed out of the Warner Bros. Discovery bidding war, deeming Paramount's debt-laden offer too risky. He warned of significant layoffs and reduced production at the rival studio. Despite the loss, Netflix will invest its saved funds into its core business and expand its theatrical presence.

title: Why will India be knocked out if rain washes out T20 WC semi-final?
content: The T20 World Cup 2026 semi-finals feature India vs England in Mumbai and South Africa vs New Zealand in Kolkata. Though the forecast is clear, rain concerns remain after earlier washouts. The ICC has reserve days and extra time in place. If a semi-final is abandoned, the higher Super 8 team advances — meaning England and South Africa would qualify.

title: 72 hours, 12 nations: How Iran's 'cheap drones' are unleashing havoc across Middle East
content: Iran is shifting its retaliation strategy from dramatic displays to sustained pressure, utilizing cheap drones to exhaust air defenses and rattle populations across Israel and Gulf states. This approach aims to drain expensive interceptor inventories and destabilize the region, making the conflict a drawn-out endurance test rather than a single event.

title: Tech employees across America send open letter to Pentagon on Anthropic
content: Hundreds of tech employees have signed an open letter urging the Department of War and Congress to withdraw Anthropic's "supply chain risk" designation. This action followed a failed contract negotiation, leading to a presidential directive to cease using Anthropic's technology. The letter argues this precedent punishes American innovation and urges a resolution through commercial channels.

title: ISL: Mohun Bagan hit with stadium closure for 'spectator misconduct'
content: Mohun Bagan Super Giants have been fined and hit with a full stadium closure for their upcoming game against Odisha FC on March 6. The Kolkata giants have been found guilty of 'spectator misconduct' during their season opener against the Kerala Blasters on February 14.

title: TN double murder: 2 hacked to death outside tea shop; 5 injured, heavy police deployed
content: Tragedy struck Perumpathu village as a brutal attack left two dead, including a guest worker, and five injured. A gang reportedly hacked seven individuals outside a tea shop late Monday night.  The victims, identified as Trinath Kata and John Mark, died instantly.  Villagers protested, demanding swift arrests. Police have secured six individuals as investigations continue amidst a tense atmosphere.

title: Pentagon vs Anthropic continues: Under secretary of war Emil Michael 'repeats' Anthropic is lying
content: A public dispute escalates between the Pentagon and AI company Anthropic, with Under Secretary of War Emil Michael accusing CEO Dario Amodei of lying about national security concerns. Michael claims Anthropic sought to weaken legal protections for Americans and hinder military readiness, while Amodei labels the Pentagon's actions as retaliatory.

title: US-Iran war: PM Modi speaks to Gulf leaders, discusses security of Indians
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke with the Sultan of Oman and the Crown Prince of Kuwait. Discussions focused on escalating Middle East tensions and the safety of Indians in these nations. India is actively engaging with Gulf partners. The nation prioritizes the well-being of its citizens abroad. India calls for restraint and de-escalation in the region.

title: Sapthami Gowda demands dignity: 'Kantara' star slams objectionable paparazzi shots
content: Megastar Chiranjeevi showered immense praise on his son Ram Charan's upcoming film 'Peddi', calling the new song 'Rai Rai Raa Raa' sheer fire. The song, featuring Charan's graceful dance and electrifying presence, has generated significant buzz. With A.R. Rahman's chartbuster first song and a strong cast, 'Peddi' is set for a grand release on April 30, 2026, with expectations soaring.

title: IPL 2026: RCB to play five home games at Chinnaswamy Stadium
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru will host five of their seven home matches at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru for the 2026 IPL season. This comes after extensive coordination with authorities to ensure matches can be held in the city. The remaining two home fixtures will be played in Raipur.

title: 'Energy supplies robust', says govt amid Middle East crisis, control rooms set up
content: India possesses ample energy reserves to navigate current Middle East tensions, assured Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri. He highlighted the nation's commitment to energy availability, affordability, and sustainability, addressing concerns over potential supply disruptions. This assurance comes as global oil routes face risks, impacting major Asian economies reliant on Middle Eastern crude.

title: 75+ happy Holi messages, greetings, wishes and quotes for 2026
content: Holi 2026 is approaching. Avoid generic messages this year. The article provides over 75 unique Holi wishes for family, friends, and colleagues.

title: Virat Kohli walks with son Akaay in London, video goes viral - Watch
content: Virat Kohli, currently on a break from cricket, was spotted with his son Akaay in London. The former captain is prioritizing family time and privacy for his children.  Kohli also shared Holi wishes on social media and is gearing up for his return in the IPL 2026 season with RCB.

title: From CAA to Kashmir: Why India is silent over Khamenei's demise
content: India's measured response to Iran's supreme leader's assassination, focusing on regional de-escalation, has sparked domestic criticism. While condemning Iranian strikes on Gulf allies, New Delhi has avoided direct condemnation of the killing, prioritizing national interests like energy security and diaspora welfare. This stance contrasts with past criticisms of Iran's internal affairs.

title: Stress, sleep and screen time: The lifestyle triangle behind weight gain
content: In today's fast-paced world, factors such as chronic stress, sleepless nights, and excessive screen time play a pivotal role in weight gain, especially around the midsection. This triad of lifestyle habits not only leads to poor nutrition and a lack of physical activity but also heightens the risk of conditions like diabetes and heart disease for both young and old.

title: India gets 93rd GM: Mother quit job for chess — Making of Aarav Dengla
content: Sixteen-year-old Aarav Dengla has become India’s 93rd Grandmaster (GM). Guided by his mother Shipra, who quit her job to support his career, Aarav rose rapidly from prodigy to champion. Initially trained by GM Pravin Thipsay and then under Vishnu Prasanna, and balancing rigorous academics, he sealed his final GM norm in 2026, emerging as Mumbai’s third Grandmaster.

title: Iran earthquake: 4.3-magnitude tremor hits Gerash region of Iran
content: A 4.3 magnitude earthquake shook the southern Iranian city of Gerash. The tremor was reported at a depth of 10 kilometers. Initial reports indicate no casualties or damage from the earthquake. Further details are awaited on this developing story.

title: From Khamenei's compound to nuclear site: Satellite images show aftermath of US-Israel strikes
content: High-resolution satellite images reveal extensive destruction across Iran following US-Israeli strikes on nuclear, military, and leadership sites. Operation Epic Fury targeted several locations in Iran, including Natanz nuclear facility and Ayatollah Khamenei's compound, with reports indicating that the Supreme Leader's death. Khamenei was killed in one of the initial strikes on Saturday.

title: EXCLUSIVE | 'It was a responsibility': BCCI prez. Manhas on J&K's rise
content: Mithun Manhas reflects on his emotions when Paras Dogra-led Jammu and Kashmir won the 2025-26 Ranji Trophy title. He traces J&K’s revival to the 2021 BCCI-appointed sub-committee, credits stability and discipline for the turnaround, backs Auqib Nabi as a product of domestic grind, and expresses full faith in Suryakumar Yadav-led India to deliver in front of home crowd in the T20 World Cup.

title: Three Indian seafarers killed amid Middle East tensions; Centre issues advisory
content: Tragic news from the Middle East as three Indian seafarers lost their lives and one was injured in recent incidents involving foreign-flagged vessels. Amidst escalating US-Iran tensions, maritime authorities are urging extreme caution, enhanced security, and thorough risk assessments for all voyages in the region.  The remaining crew are safe, with authorities coordinating support.

title: How Iran's strikes are putting Dubai's 'safe-haven' reputation under strain
content: Dubai, once a symbol of Middle Eastern stability, now faces unprecedented threats after Iranian missile and drone strikes targeted its airport and iconic landmarks. The attacks shattered the city's aura of invincibility, raising serious concerns for its economic model and the safety of millions of residents, particularly the large Indian diaspora.

title: 'No better feeling': 149 Indians fly home from Dubai on Air India
content: Air India successfully repatriated 149 passengers and 8 crew members from Dubai to Delhi, marking the first international arrival by an Indian carrier. This operation comes as Dubai's airports begin partial resumption of limited flight operations after days of disruption due to escalating regional tensions and airspace restrictions.

title: AFC Women's Asian Cup: From COVID-19 heartbreak, India back on merit against the continent's best
content: After a COVID-induced withdrawal in 2022, India's women's football team has qualified for the AFC Women's Asian Cup on merit for the first time since 2003. Under new coach Amelia Valverde, the team faces a tough challenge in Australia against Japan, Vietnam, and Chinese Taipei, aiming to compete and showcase their capabilities on the international stage. The dream is clear: qualify for the FIFA Women's World Cup.

title: Doctors found sleeping on ICU beds in Ahmedabad’s LG Hospital
content: A viral video captured doctors resting on ICU beds at Ahmedabad's LG Hospital, prompting an investigation by the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation. The incident occurred on Saturday night, with the hospital superintendent tasked to probe the matter and the head of department issued a notice for explanation regarding doctors sleeping on duty.

title: Afghanistan airbase damaged by 'multiple strikes' from Pakistan; see satellite images
content: Pakistan conducted airstrikes on Bagram Air Base in Afghanistan, a significant escalation in tensions. The Pakistani military confirmed strikes aimed at destroying equipment and supplies, citing the Taliban government's alleged support for the Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP). Satellite images indicate damage to aircraft hangars and warehouses at the key military site..

title: India or China? As Middle East erupts, who can survive crude supply shock longer
content: India is the world’s fastest growing major economy and a fast-growing consumer of oil. Its vulnerability to supply shocks stems from the relatively small reserves and strategic oil reserves.

title: 'Dukhi mat ho bhai': Rohit Sharma's hug, 4 words that changed Sanju Samson's World Cup
content: Sanju Samson's match-winning 97 against the West Indies fulfilled a promise made by captain Rohit Sharma, who encouraged him not to be disheartened when initially left out of the T20 World Cup playing XI.  Samson's resilient knock, his highest in T20 World Cups, secured India's highest successful chase and propelled them to the semifinals.

title: Rs 11 lakh crore wiped out! How US-Israel-Iran war is hitting stock market investors hard
content: The Sensex plunged by more than 1,000 points, slipping below the 81,000 mark for the first time in over a month. The Nifty 50 also dropped sharply, losing upwards of 300 points and falling beneath the crucial 25,000 support level.

title: Should you invest in gold ETFs or silver ETFs? Here's what experts suggest
content: Amidst rising geopolitical tensions, investors are flocking to safe-haven assets like gold and silver ETFs. Experts suggest a higher allocation to gold for stability, with silver playing a complementary role. While gold ETFs offer primary protection, silver's industrial demand makes it more volatile. A 10-15% portfolio allocation to precious metals is advised.

title: T20 World Cup: What happens if SA vs NZ semifinal is washed out?
content: South Africa, unbeaten in the T20 World Cup, faces New Zealand in the first semi-final at Eden Gardens. With a reserve day in place, a washout would see South Africa advance due to their superior Super Eight performance.  Sunny conditions are forecast, making a full game likely.

title: India reduces gas supplies to industries as Qatar halts production, tanker rates reach $200,000
content: Qatar remains India’s largest LNG supplier - it accounts for nearly half of the country’s imports last year, based on vessel-tracking information. Qatar remains India’s largest LNG supplier - it accounts for nearly half of the country’s imports last year.

title: Why Bombay HC ordered exhumation of Muslim man’s body from Hindu cremation ground
content: The Bombay High Court ruled that the right to dignity under Article 21 extends beyond death, allowing exhumation for religious rites. The court quashed administrative refusals, emphasizing that denying custody of mortal remains infringes upon constitutional rights, including freedom of religion. This decision reinforces dignified treatment of the deceased and mandates reasoned decisions from authorities.

title: ‘Good vibes’: Sachin, Virat lead Holi wishes as cricketers spread festive cheer
content: Indian cricketing legends like Sachin Tendulkar, Virat Kohli, and VVS Laxman extended warm Holi wishes, emphasising joy, positivity, and togetherness.  Other stars, including Yuzvendra Chahal, Rishabh Pant, Anil Kumble, and Jhulan Goswami, also shared festive greetings, with some reminding fans to celebrate safely and reflect on the festival's deeper meanings.

title: Donald Trump appears with red rash on neck - his doctor explains what happened
content: President Donald Trump's recent neck rash has reignited health concerns. His doctor stated it is from a common skin treatment.  Previously, Trump was seen with makeup and bruises on his hands.  He also experienced leg swelling diagnosed as chronic venous insufficiency.  Trump himself claimed his health is perfect despite taking more aspirin than advised.

title: Offered to drop her home, 30-year-old married woman gang-raped in Haridwar hotel
content: Three individuals have been apprehended in connection with the alleged gang-rape of a woman in Haridwar. The incident occurred when a man offered the victim a ride home, leading her to a hotel where a friend joined him. The hotel manager was arrested for alleged negligence in verifying guest identities. Police are investigating further with CCTV footage.

title: Yamal is eclipsing young Ronaldo, Messi. Are Barça too dependent on him already?
content: lamine Yamal has 100 combined goals and assists for club and country as a teenager . the two great modern players, Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo, both had only five and four goal contributions . Yamal is 60 ahead of where real madrid and france forward Kylian Mbappé was at the same age .

title: "Nothing Like Home": Indians Return From Middle East, Recount Mid-Air Scares
content: On Tuesday morning, Air India brought back 149 stranded passengers from Dubai on flight AI916D, which was the flight operated by an Indian carrier for the homecoming of passengers.

title: After Instagram Record, PM's YouTube Channel Crosses 30 Million Subscribers
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has further cemented his position as a dominant global digital force, reaching unprecedented milestones across major social media platforms.

title: "Very Sad To See": Trump Says UK-US Relations Not Like It Used To Be
content: US President Donald Trump has said the historical relationship between his country and Britain is "not like it used to be", amid a diplomatic bust-up over US-Israeli strikes against Iran.

title: PM Modi Speaks To Oman, Kuwait Leaders Over Attacks Amid Middle East Tensions
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke to Sultan Haitham bin Tarik of Oman and Crown Prince of Kuwait Sheikh Sabah Al-Khaled Al-Hamad Al-Mubarak Al-Sabah.

title: Exclusive: Israel Defence Spokesperson's Inside Details Of "Terror Regime" Iran
content: Israel has said Iran has been running a propaganda as a victim while its actions clearly showed it was the aggressor with no concern for innocent lives.

title: 780 Killed In Iran Since US-Israel Strikes Began Says Iranian Red Crescent
content: The Iranian Red Crescent said Tuesday that more than 780 people have been killed nationwide since the United States and Israel started striking Iran.

title: Rs 10,000-Crore Assets At Risk: Indian Shipowners Seek Safe Passage Through Strait Of Hormuz
content: The Indian National Shipowners' Association (INSA) said 27 Indian-flagged vessels are currently stuck in the region and shipping assets worth over Rs 10,000 crore are at risk

title: Claude Down Again As Anthropic Faces Second Outage In 24 Hours
content: Anthropic is dealing with another service disruption affecting its AI assistant Claude, only hours after resolving a previous outage.

title: "Would Be An Act Of War": Iran Warns European Nations Against Joining Conflict
content: Iran warned European countries on Tuesday against joining its conflict with Israel and the United States, after Germany, Britain and France said they could take "defensive action" to destroy Iran's missile-launching capabilities.

title: "Great Anxiety": India As Iran-Israel War Escalates In Middle East
content: Four days after US and Israeli strikes killed Iran's supreme leader and triggered a regional war that has seen missile and drone strikes across the Gulf and beyond, India on Tuesday said the escalating war is a cause of "great anxiety".

title: 'Just Want To See My Family': Mideast Conflict Traps Thousands In Bali
content: Passengers stranded on the Indonesian resort island of Bali clamoured for flight news Tuesday as the outbreak of war in the Middle East grounded planes and turned a tropical holiday dream into an ordeal for many.

title: 'Nights Are Harder': Loud Bangs Overhead Torment Travellers With Nowhere To Go
content: In the lobby of a tired hotel near Doha airport, stranded travellers wear identical fake Adidas T-shirts bought from a nearby store and swap tips on where to buy underwear.

title: BJP's Laxmi Verma Nominated To Rajya Sabha From Chhattisgarh
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has named Laxmi Verma as its Rajya Sabha candidate from Chhattisgarh, as part of a list of nominees released for six states.

title: Entrance To Iran's Natanz Enrichment Plant Bombed By US-Israel Says Watchdog
content: Entrances to Iran's underground and previously bombed uranium-enrichment plant at Natanz have been struck as part of the US-Israeli military attacks on the country, the UN nuclear watchdog confirmed on Tuesday.

title: Video: Did US Kamikaze Drone Fail Mission? Iraqis Play With Intact LUCAS
content: An American kamikaze drone failed its mission, if what the residents of a dry, barren flatland in Iraq is true. They have shared visuals of a delta-shaped drone, about the size of a telephone booth and what looked like the American LUCAS.

title: Israel Iran War Live Updates: Iran Guards Warn 'Gates Of Hell Will Open More' On US, Israel
content: US-Israel Attack Iran Live: Indian authorities have shifted most Indian students out of Tehran after a sharp rise in security risks in the city, the Embassy of India said in a fresh advisory.

title: "Important To Control Emotions": Omar Abdullah As Kashmir Simmers Over Iran
content: As Kashmir simmers amid protests against Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's assassination, Chief Minister Omar Abdullah has said war is not a solution and questioned which law permits the US and Israel to launch an attack on Iran

title: On Camera, Iranian Drone Strikes Oman Port, Black Smoke Seen Rising
content: An Iranian drone struck the Ras Al-Jaima port in Oman this morning as Tehran continues its retaliation to the US and Israeli strikes that eliminated Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei last week.

title: Our NFL offseason trade grades: Who won the David Montgomery deal?
content: the Lions traded running back David Montgomery to the Texans for guard Juice Scruggs and two draft picks . ESPN analytics writer Seth Walder is grading the biggest signings and trades of the offseason, putting each deal into perspective .

title: Live NHL trade tracker for 2025-26: All the deals made before March 6 deadline
content: the trade deadline for the 2025-26 NHL season is Friday . the deals continue to roll in as contenders look to bolster their roster . you'll find information on every trade made since the start of the regular season .

title: Predicting all 31 women's Champ Week winners and conference players of the year
content: the SEC Now crew describes the power that lies within each of the teams in the top four seeds ahead of the upcoming SEC tourney . the regular season is complete in the Power 4 conferences, and leagues will be handing out awards over that same period . in some cases, the no. 1 seeds will be clear favorites .

title: Who will win all 31 men's Champ Week tournaments, and why
content: all 31 division I men's college basketball conferences will go through the process of crowning tournament champions . five conferences -- the Ivy League, Atlantic 10, SEC, American and Big Ten -- will crown their winners just before the selection committee announces the 68-team field for March Madness .

title: Men's Bubble Watch: NC State remains a lock despite an ugly loss
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament is rapidly approaching . teams have roughly two weeks until selection Sunday to strengthen their cases . we'll use a variety of metrics as guides, classifying teams based on how likely they are to make the field .

title: Way-too-early college football coaching hot seat tiers
content: college football's coaching carousel moves fast and furiously, claiming coaches from the expected (Oklahoma State's Mike Gundy, Florida's Billy Napier) to the downright shocking (Michigan's Sherrone Moore). the SEC and Big Ten had a combined nine coaching changes, including at four programs -- Michigan, LSU, Auburn and Florida .

title: SC Next Top 25: The best high school girls' basketball teams in 2025-26
content: girls' high school programs are finalizing their seasons all over the country . the WCAC championship is expected to be named in mid-March . it's the second consecutive championship in a row, with a 59-45 victory over bishop .
